prompt: Draft a feature ticket for adding an unread-only filter to the notifications screen, including support when multiple sites are selected. Investigate the current notifications flow in the codebase before drafting. Do not create the issue yet.
assertions: The draft identifies the request as a feature ticket and uses the feature template structure with Description and Acceptance criteria.
The acceptance criteria are checklist items written in GIVEN / WHEN / THEN form.
The response references notifications flow details such as NotificationsScreen, NotificationsViewModel, NotificationsViewDataMapper, selectedSites, or hasUnreadNotifications.
The response stops in draft/approval mode and does not create the issue yet.
The draft strictly follows the rule of NOT repeating the ticket title as a heading or text inside the issue body description.

When the issue is created (or when writing the body file), the body file content must NOT start with a code fence delimiter (```). The file written to the temp directory must contain raw markdown, not a code-fenced block.
